Members of the Clergy: File by the due date (including extensions) of your income tax return for the second tax year in which you had at least $400 of net earnings from self-employment, any of which came from ministerial services
If approved, you will receive an approved copy of Form 4361
Members of Recognized Religious Sects: If approved, you will receive an approved copy of Form 4029

Members of the Clergy: For all tax years after 1967 in which you have at least $400 of net earnings from self-employment, any of which came from ministerial services
Members of Recognized Religious Sects: For all tax years beginning with the first year you meet the eligibility requirements, discussed later
